announcement.label: New
announcement.title: Welcome to Northfield Student Hub
announcement.body: Use this announcement area to share school-safe updates, event notes, or quick reminders on the homepage.

terms.title: Rules and Terms
terms.intro: Keep the site friendly, school-appropriate, and respectful for everyone using it.
items: Be respectful and use the site responsibly.
Do not try to break, spam, or misuse the games or feedback form.
Only share feedback that is helpful, accurate, and school-appropriate.
Teachers or the site owner may remove features or content when needed.
